instruction: Pink clouds aren't on brand. Reset this icon to its default black outline.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="cloud" data-source="heroicons/outline/cloud.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #ec4899" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 15a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 4.5 4.5H18a3.75 3.75 0 0 0 1.332-7.257 3 3 0 0 0-3.758-3.848 5.25 5.25 0 0 0-10.233 2.33A4.502 4.502 0 0 0 2.25 15Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
